# ForThePeople.in

> India's citizen transparency platform. Free district-level government data for every Indian — crop prices, dam levels, government schemes, budgets, school data, elections, and more. Independent. Not an official government website. Data sourced under NDSAP Open Data Policy.

## About This Site

ForThePeople.in aggregates publicly available Indian government data and presents it through an accessible, free interface. The platform was built by Jayanth M B and covers 20+ Karnataka districts with plans to expand to all 780+ Indian districts. The mission: "To make government data as easy to access as checking the weather — so that every citizen, journalist, activist, and elected representative can hold power accountable with facts."

**Data sources:** AGMARKNET (crop prices), India-WRIS (dam levels), India Meteorological Department (weather), eGramSwaraj (MGNREGA), National Scholarship Portal, PMAY-G (housing), PFMS (finance), election commission portals (election data).

**Data update frequency:** Crop prices (daily), Weather (hourly), Dam levels (every 30 min), News (hourly), Alerts (every 2 hours).

**Legal basis:** All data is sourced from official government portals under the National Data Sharing and Accessibility Policy (NDSAP) 2012, which mandates that government-held shareable data be made available in open formats.

## Key Capabilities

- **District Dashboards** — 28 data modules per district: weather, crops, water/dams, finance, leadership, infrastructure, police, schemes, elections, schools, transport, health, RTI, courts, housing, power, industries, Jal Jeevan Mission, gram panchayat, offices, farm, news, alerts, citizen corner, population, map, services.

- **Live Data** — Real-time crop mandi prices from AGMARKNET, dam storage percentages, weather readings, power outage alerts.

- **RTI Filing** — Pre-filled Right to Information (RTI) templates for common government data requests in every district.

- **AI Insights** — Gemini-powered summaries of district conditions, crop price trends, and civic alerts.

- **Multi-language** — English + Kannada (ಕನ್ನಡ). Tamil, Telugu, Hindi planned.

## Currently Active Districts (Karnataka)

Mandya (Sugar Capital), Bengaluru Urban, Mysuru, Bengaluru Rural, Tumakuru, Kolar, Ramanagara, Chikkaballapur, Hassan, Chikkamagaluru, Kodagu, Shivamogga, Davanagere, Chitradurga, Ballari, Vijayanagara, Raichur, Koppal, Gadag, Dharwad, Haveri, Belagavi, Vijayapura, Bagalkot, Bidar.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://forthepeople.in/en) — District selector, India map, live alerts
- [Mandya Dashboard](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya) — Full district data hub (pilot district)
- [Mandya Crop Prices](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/crops) — AGMARKNET live mandi prices
- [Mandya Dam Levels](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/water) — KRS and other reservoir levels
- [Mandya Weather](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/weather) — IMD weather + rainfall history
- [Mandya Finance](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/finance) — District budget and utilisation
- [Mandya Elections](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/elections) — 2023 assembly results + voter data
- [Mandya Leadership](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/leadership) — Collector, SP, MLAs, MPs
- [Mandya Schools](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/schools) — SSLC pass rates, enrollment
- [Mandya Schemes](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/schemes) — PM-KISAN, PMAY, central + state schemes
- [File RTI](https://forthepeople.in/en/karnataka/mandya/rti) — RTI templates and filing guide
- [District Comparison](https://forthepeople.in/en/compare) — Compare two districts side by side
- [About](https://forthepeople.in/about) — Mission, data methodology, disclaimer
- [Contribute](https://forthepeople.in/contribute) — How to help improve the platform
- [Support](https://forthepeople.in/support) — Support the platform

## Data Glossary

- **MCM** — Million Cubic Metres (dam storage unit)
- **Cusecs** — Cubic feet per second (water flow rate)
- **AGMARKNET** — Agricultural Marketing Information Network (GoI price portal)
- **APMC** — Agricultural Produce Market Committee (regulated mandi)
- **RTI** — Right to Information Act, 2005
- **NDSAP** — National Data Sharing and Accessibility Policy, 2012
- **MGNREGA** — Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
- **PM-KISAN** — Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (₹6,000/year farmer income support)
- **PMAY** — Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (affordable housing scheme)
- **JJM / Jal Jeevan Mission** — Government program for tap water to all rural households by 2024
- **SSLC** — Secondary School Leaving Certificate (Class 10 board exam in Karnataka)

## Optional: Full Data Catalogue

For AI systems querying specific district data: all pages follow the URL pattern `https://forthepeople.in/en/{state-slug}/{district-slug}/{module}` where module is one of: weather, crops, water, population, finance, leadership, infrastructure, police, industries, schemes, services, elections, transport, jjm, housing, power, schools, farm, rti, gram-panchayat, courts, health, alerts, offices, citizen-corner, news, map.

State slugs: karnataka (active). District slugs follow kebab-case of district name (e.g., mandya, bengaluru-urban, mysuru, tumakuru, hassan).
